title: whisper to field not validated: unbounded enqueue to arbitrary keys
description: In ws.rs WHISPER and SEALED_WHISPER handlers (lines ~1104, ~1159), params.to is used directly in deliver_live() and store.enqueue() with zero validation. Unlike GROUP_ADD which validates member_pub_id format (64 hex chars) and calls user_exists(), WHISPER does neither. A sender can enqueue messages to arbitrary strings (e.g. path-traversal strings, non-existent pub_ids, very long keys), causing unbounded growth of offline_messages rows. Fix: validate params.to is a 64-char lowercase hex string and optionally that user_exists() before enqueuing.
